name: Hersheys Fudgey Chocolate Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a medium saucepan over low heat.
2. Stir in Hersheys cocoa and 3/4 cup sugar; blend until smooth.
3. Remove from heat; cool for 5 minutes.
4. Blend in almonds and flour.
5. Beat egg yolks one at a time into the mixture.
6. Stir in water.
7. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites until foamy.
8. Gradually add remaining sugar, beating just until soft peaks form.
9. Gently fold chocolate mixture into egg whites; blend thoroughly.
10. Pour into greased and floured 9 inch layer pan.
11. Bake at 350 degrees for 30 minutes. The cake will settle slightly.
12. Remove from pan onto a wire rack; cool completely.
13. Invert the cake onto a serving plate.
14. Spread top and sides with chocolate glaze.
15. Garnish as desired.
CHOCOLATE GLAZE:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in a small saucepan over low heat.
2. Add 2 tablespoons Hersheys cocoa and 2 tablespoons water; stir constantly until the mixture thickens.
3. Do not boil. Remove from heat; add 1/2 teaspoon vanilla.
4. Gradually add 1 cup confectioners sugar, beating with a whisk until smooth.
